postCanonicalMergeAdjustments.reason: port-adapter-library-governance adds two accepted package contracts after specsless cutover; successor projections must remain governance-records-owned and aggregate feat-inputs must include every package-contract row

proposal-rund-batteryd-jsonl-compaction declared package/runtime boundaries; evidence-only preservation was insufficient for specs discoverability, so a planned contract registration was added without promoting runtime/proof artifacts to production authority

browser-log-lib-core-port proposal declared a canonical specs-main package path and local proof; overlay alone was insufficient for specsless/governance discoverability, so a planned contract registration was added without promoting runtime adapters or system closure.

billing-channel-config canonical diff added specs and ops package paths but lacked specs record/governance projection rows; registration was added without promoting provider runtime adapters or complete saleable-corporation authority.

log-contract durable OTel ingest scoped correction changed existing package contract semantics; governance-records package-contract/projection-digest/feat-input rows were refreshed without adding a new package or promoting runtime collector implementation

batch merged local SSOT selective source changes plus rule lifecycle, infra VPS control ledger, single meaning surface, and modeldraw core-port proposals; projection and feat-input rows regenerated from governance records

Jun 7 new proposal batch added JSONL surface proof and public promotion revenue gates while preserving localhost overlay and ADR proposal trace ledger; package projection and feat inputs regenerated from governance records.

proposal-jsonl-datamodeling-duckdb-ci-v2 adds a DuckDB-required JSONL datamodeling CI contract; merge keeps package/source/provenance while blocking runtime green until DuckDB executable evidence exists.
proposal-only interaction contract/surface projection boundary adds a planned package contract; runtime and canonical promotion are not claimed

policy-gate-core worktree adds a runner-agnostic package-backed check for proposal falsification proof, fresh differential evidence, artifact binding, cause split, and human promotion boundary; provider-specific CI and self-approval are not promoted.

cloud-context-cli-adapter-catalog proposal overlay adds a provider-neutral cloud context, credentialRef, provider adapter, doctor/guard, and destructive casebook contract; secret values, live provider calls, and runtime cloud mutation are not promoted.
Union rebased package-contract proposals on latest specsless SSOT while preserving governance-records as package/build authority.

postCanonicalMergeAdjustments.activeSpecsMainProposalPolicy: all future proposals that introduce, restore, or require active specs-main are rejected before merge
postCanonicalMergeAdjustments.reason: Merge reach-market claim approval contract as a governance-records planned package while preserving plus-proposals already in SSOT and forbidding active specs-main proposal paths.
